assertions.title: Token header with price and change

steps.action: Reload the page and wait for steady state
steps.expected: Header shows CASH icon/name/ticker, current price, and 24h change percentage colored green/red
steps.observed: Header shows CASH icon/name/ticker and price ($0.000000), but no 24h change percentage is visible

steps.action: Check computed style of the rendered price

evidence.consoleErrors: none (only info/log messages: React DevTools suggestion and HMR connected)
evidence.network: GET /market observed in browser request log during load

assertions.issues: Required 24h change percentage is missing; price typography does not match monospace requirement.

steps.expected: Shows Market Cap (--), 24h Volume (from /market), FDV (--), Total Supply (--)
steps.observed: Grid shows Market cap --, 24H volume $0.00, FDV --, Total supply --

steps.expected: Labels muted; values white, bold, monospace
steps.observed: Labels are muted gray; values are white and bold monospace

evidence.consoleErrors: none (only info/log messages: React DevTools suggestion and HMR connected)
evidence.network: GET /market observed in browser request log

steps.expected: Chart area shows loading skeleton/shimmer placeholder (not blank)
steps.observed: Chart card shows loading placeholder with "Loading chart..." before final chart empty-state appears

evidence.consoleErrors: none (only info/log messages: React DevTools suggestion and HMR connected)
evidence.network: GET /candles?interval=5m and GET /candles?interval=1h observed during load

steps.action: Capture page at initial reload frame
steps.expected: Skeleton placeholders visible for chart, token stats, swap quote, and transactions; no blank regions
steps.observed: Initial frame shows chart loading placeholder, stats skeleton values, swap quote skeleton bars, and transactions table skeleton rows

evidence.consoleErrors: none (only info/log messages: React DevTools suggestion and HMR connected)
evidence.network: Initial load triggers market/candles requests while skeleton placeholders are rendered

frictions.description: Loading skeleton phase is brief and required immediate post-reload capture to preserve evidence.
frictions.resolution: Captured time-sliced screenshots at reload t=0ms, t=500ms, and t=1700ms; used t=0ms for loading-state assertions.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-LAYOUT-005, VAL-CHART-004, VAL-POLISH-005) and 1 failed (VAL-LAYOUT-004: missing 24h change percentage and non-monospace price).
